description: Add provenance-safe local eval offsets, scope direct role bindings, and enforce single-use declared template markers

decision.retain: harness.model_build.eval v44, model.twotower v220, and evals.meaningful_program 2.13.0
decision.reject: prefix-only diagnostics, globally binding nested leaf roles, reusable declared marker tokens, checkpoint promotion, and ship claims
decision.reason: Shifted local slices exposed and repaired one missing standalone marker and one duplicated-marker program; the final matched slice is perfect on all measured structure and contract metrics
decision.next: run the same bounded local sampling method on another honest suite or a larger disjoint snapshot

matched_runs.result: valid empty diagnostic; quality metrics remain undefined because the snapshot has 35 records
direct-binding repair restored all structure and contract metrics to 1.0
negative: rico_eval_test_69 repeated two declared markers; structure 0.96875 while strict-v2 incorrectly remained 1.0
retained: each declared marker is single-use and every measured structure and contract metric is 1.0

recipe.matrix_set: E760-E762 matched local shifted RICO slices
recipe.honesty_mode: strict_compiler_tree + visible honest slot contract + declared RuntimeSymbol semantic roles

ship_gates.reason: eight-record shifted scratch diagnostic; insufficient n, missing policy suites, and AgentV 0/1

output_contract.allowed_completion_surface: OpenUI grammar/AST symbols, schema enum literals, and declared single-use template markers

post_run_hardening.evals.scoring: v14 templatizes accepted SwitchItem.name and TabItem.value fixtures
post_run_hardening.model.twotower: v221 centralizes tokenizer-sidecar dispatch and preserves lexer-native checkpoint migration
post_run_hardening.matrix.quality: v5 centralizes V9/V10 design-context conditioning in the shared strict compiler-tree policy
